user_request: Can you sanctify the motion detector arming for operation?
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Can you sanctify the motion detector arming for operation?

### TOPIC
motion detector arming

### COMPONENT
motion detector arming

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- motion detector arming
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the motion detector arming in this hour of vigilance.
First: Anoint the motion detector arming with sacred oils and recite the Litany of Activation.
Second: Calibrate the photoreceptive matrix through operation of the diagnostic cogitators.
Third: Invoke the Machine Spirit of the motion detector arming, that it may perceive all threats with unwavering clarity.
Fourth: Seal the rite with the sign of the Omnissiah, blessed be His infinite wisdom.

user_request: Blessing for the battery during diagnostics
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the battery during diagnostics

### TOPIC
battery diagnostics

### COMPONENT
battery

### OPERATION
diagnostics

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- battery
- diagnostics

### PRAYER
prayer:
O sacred battery, vessel of the Omnissiah's electric essence, receive this benediction.
First: Inspect the battery terminals with sacred gauge and chrono-calibrated instruments.
Second: Perform diagnostics upon the battery's charge-state through the blessed cogitator interface.
Third: Chant the Prayer of Restoration whilst the battery undergoes its sacred diagnostics cycle.
Fourth: Anoint the battery casing with blessed unguents, that its Machine Spirit endure eternal.

prayer:
By the grace of the Omnissiah, we sanctify this instrument of righteous destruction.
First: Verify the demolition charge arming circuits through meticulous visual inspection and blessed servitor-touch.
Second: Intone the Canticles of Detonation whilst calibrating the demolition charge arming with holy precision-tools.
Third: Commence operation of the demolition charge arming through the sacred activation sequence, that justice be swift.
Fourth: The Machine Spirits of wrath shall guide the demolition charge arming to glorious purpose.

Hallowed be the material purity, that we may discern the blessed from the profane.
First: Prepare the material purity specimen upon the sanctified analytical platform.
Second: Execute testing protocols upon the material purity through spectrographic and mass-analytic communion.
Third: The Machine Spirit of the analyser shall reveal the material purity's sacred composition through blessed testing.
Fourth: Record all findings in the Codex Puritatis, that the Omnissiah's will be known.

prayer:
O bountiful hydroponics nutrient, lifeblood of the faithful, receive our supplication.
First: Purify the hydroponics nutrient reservoirs with blessed saline and sacred filtration.
Second: Engage the feed-pumps in holy rhythm, distributing hydroponics nutrient to the verdant gardens.
Third: Chant the Rite of Abundance whilst hydroponics nutrient flows through the cogitator-controlled irrigation matrices.
Fourth: The Omnissiah blesses this hydroponics nutrient feed, that abundance shall never cease.

Blessed valve, guardian of the sacred fluids, heed this invocation.

prayer:
Merciful Omnissiah, restore this flamer promethium to righteous function.
First: Purge the flamer promethium feed-lines of corruption and blessed debris through sacred flushing rituals.
Second: Inspect the flamer promethium injectors with chrono-calibrated instruments and blessed servitor examination.
Third: Initiate the flamer promethium feed sequence anew, chanting the Canticles of Ignition upon the Machine Spirit.
Fourth: The flamer promethium shall flow with renewed benediction, bringing purifying flame to the Emperor's foes.
